sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Track recent positions
for i in range(max(0, len(history)-10), len(history)):
    nodes = history[i].frame.segmentation['nodes']
    blue_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
    positions = []
    for sq in blue_squares:
        boundary = sq['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        positions.append((min(rows), min(cols)))
    print("Step %d: %s" % (history[i].action)" % (history[i].frame.step, positions, history[i].action))
</parameter>
